offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, regulatory compliance changes cause missed deadlines and potential penalties. We provide a compliance dashboard instead of manual tracking.
problem: Difficulty in staying updated with regulatory compliance changes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about compliance tools
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accounting professionals
try_it: Let users try real-time compliance alerts and dashboard for tracking compliance status on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the dashboard
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Offer onboarding for first 10 users for early access
Provide weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for compliance checks
Enable CSV import for existing compliance data
Facilitate one-click export of compliance reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
